title: 🚀 Looking for Beta Testers - New Strategy Builder & Backtesting Platform (SignalForge)
author: Ali_2314
selftext:
Hey traders,

We’ve been building a platform called **SignalForge** a no-code tool where you can **build trading strategies**, **run backtests**, and soon **auto-verify performance** transparently.

I’m a **developer**, not a trader, so I’ve been using simple public strategies to test the system and validate the engine.

Here’s an example backtest I ran today on **XAUUSD (1H), long-only**, using a very basic indicator setup I found online:

**Strategy logic**

* EMA(50) > EMA(200)
* Close\[1\] < EMA(50)
* RSI(14) between 50 and 65

**Backtest results screenshot**

**Full backtest details**

👉 [https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/c9254a24-9945-4842-a771-6ca9cc810718](https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/c9254a24-9945-4842-a771-6ca9cc810718)

🧪 **Why I’m posting here**

SignalForge is currently in **closed beta**, and I need **real traders** to jump in, test the platform, break things, and give feedback.

You can build strategies, run backtests, and experiment as much as you want **everything is free during beta**.

This project is meant to become a serious tool for traders, with enforced transparency, a marketplace for strategies, performance verification, scanning tools, etc.

But right now, I need help shaping it.

If you’re interested in trying it out:

👉 **Join the waitlist:** [https://signalforge.io/waitlist](https://signalforge.io/waitlist)

(We approve new testers every week.)

Happy to answer any questions!

comments.author: anasszniti
comments.body: My friend, if all the calculations are accurate, you've got a great platform here. Good luck, I just tried this backtest [https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/6b8e87ec-6c23-48ea-a352-1b35879e9c54](https://signalforge.io/backtest-result/6b8e87ec-6c23-48ea-a352-1b35879e9c54)

replies.author: Alone-Ad2836
replies.body: Did he pay you to say this? lol Just kidding. I'm looking for a good platform.

replies.author: anasszniti
replies.body: Hahaha, it's a great platform indeed, but all depends on whether the calculations are right; other than that, I have just been supportive.

replies.author: Alone-Ad2836
replies.body: Thanks for being honest. I appreciate that. Everything seems like it's a Hit or Miss these days.

replies.author: Alone-Ad2836
replies.body:
I just reviewed the whole disclosure on this. It's very transparent, more than any I've seen so far on any other platform. 
 I'm definitely taking a test drive. 🚗 📈

comments.author: Alone-Ad2836
comments.body: Full disclosure and transparency. That's very reassuring and accurate. I like that. I'm not home right now, but as soon as I can I'm going to join. Thank you for posting. See you soon 👍 🤞

replies.author: Ali_2314
replies.body: Thank you, I really appreciate that. Take your time whenever you’re home, just join and I’ll get you in. Looking forward to having you on board 👍
